description_long: This house features a rectangular layout enclosed by a perimeter wall, with a spacious courtyard containing several mature trees and landscaped areas. The main building is two stories high, with a flat roof and a prominent balcony supported by arches and columns overlooking the courtyard. The facade includes large windows and a double garage, while the rear section has a covered patio and additional outbuildings. The exterior is finished in a neutral, light brown color, and the property is accessed via a wide driveway leading to the garage. The architectural style is simple and functional, with Mediterranean influences visible in the arches and courtyard design.
description: A two-story, flat-roofed house with a courtyard, arched balcony, double garage, and mature trees, enclosed by a perimeter wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, arched balcony, and part of the courtyard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the perimeter wall, side windows, and the covered patio area with visible greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the courtyard, mature trees, and the back of the house with the balcony and outbuildings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, additional trees, and the relationship between the main building and outbuildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large windows on the main facade
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a double garage, arched porch with columns, and a wide driveway, with steps leading to the front door.
